Titan Company Ltd

Titan Company Summary Chart Analysis Peers Quarters Profit & Loss Balance Sheet Cash Flow Ratios Investors Documents

Titan Company Ltd

₹ 4,461 -0.45%
03 Jul - close price
titancompany.in BSE: 500114 NSE: TITAN
About

Titan Company Ltd is among India’s most respected lifestyle companies. It has established leadership positions in the Watches, Jewellery and Eyewear categories led by its trusted brands and differentiated customer experience. It was founded in 1984 as a joint-venture between TATA Group and Tamilnadu Industrial Development Corporation (TIDCO). [1]

Key Points

Part of the Tata Group[1] [2]
The company benefits from its association with the Tata Group, one of India’s most established and diversified business conglomerates. As of FY26, the Tata Group held a 25% stake in the company, including a 21% shareholding through Tata Sons Pvt Ltd., while Tamil Nadu Industrial Development Corporation Limited (TIDCO) held 28%.

Website BSE NSE
  • Market Cap ₹ 3,96,050 Cr.
  • Current Price ₹ 4,461
  • High / Low ₹ 4,605 / 3,301
  • Stock P/E 76.9
  • Book Value ₹ 177
  • Dividend Yield 0.34 %
  • ROCE 20.5 %
  • ROE 37.7 %
  • Face Value ₹ 1.00
Edit ratios

Pros

  • Company is expected to give good quarter
  • Company has a good return on equity (ROE) track record: 3 Years ROE 34.4%
  • Company has been maintaining a healthy dividend payout of 27.9%
  • Company's median sales growth is 22.1% of last 10 years

Cons

  • Stock is trading at 25.2 times its book value
  • Company might be capitalizing the interest cost

* The pros and cons are machine generated. Pros / cons are based on a checklist to highlight important points. Please exercise caution and do your own analysis.

Documents

Announcements

All
  • Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Newspaper Publication
    1d - Newspaper advertisement regarding Notice of the 42nd Annual General Meeting
  • Letter To Shareholders In Relation To Integrated Annual Report Of The Company For The Financial Year 2025-26
    2d - Titan dispatched FY2025-26 Integrated Annual Report access letters to shareholders without registered email addresses.
  • Reg. 34 (1) Annual Report. 2d
  • Business Responsibility and Sustainability Reporting (BRSR)
    2d - Titan submitted BRSR for FY 2025-26 as part of its Integrated Annual Report.
  • Notice Of The 42Nd Annual General Meeting Of The Company For FY 2025-26 2d
